subcodes.first_line: O Greater Branch! In truth, after Thee this Scene shall become the Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غصن اکبر فی الحقیقه این منظر بعد از شما سجن اعظم
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for prosperity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @personal instructions
